entities.name: SUDANIAN ZONE
entities.description: Semi-arid ecological zone where pearl millet is a major staple crop

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: Country where pearl millet growing area has expanded but yields have dropped

entities.name: ICRISAT SAHELIAN CENTER
entities.description: Research center providing insights on yield increases in the Sahel

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: Measure of crop production that has declined in Niger

entities.name: MANUAL LABOR
entities.description: Primary means of performing cropping operations by subsistence farmers

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Agricultural inputs that are rarely applied in the described systems

entities.name: WEEDING
entities.description: Cropping operation most severely affected by labor shortages

entities.name: FALLOWING
entities.description: Practice of leaving land uncropped to allow natural restoration of fertility

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management activities that can limit yield if untimely

entities.name: SUBSISTENCE FARMING
entities.description: Farming system characterized by manual labor and limited cash inputs

entities.name: TECHNICAL CHANGE
entities.description: Innovation in farming that has not yet impacted food production in the region

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The natural process of returning nutrients to the soil

entities.name: SANDY SOILS
entities.description: Soil type characteristic of the Sahelian crop production systems

entities.name: LABOR SHORTAGES
entities.description: Constraint that severely impacts weeding operations

entities.name: MARGINAL AREAS
entities.description: Low-quality lands into which crop production has expanded

entities.name: LOW SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: Principal limiting factor for increasing crop yields

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Principal limiting factor for increasing crop yields
